Chapter I

Our Origin Story

Every legend has a beginning. Ours started with a gym injury message on Bottled — and Ananya who replied.

01
🌊 Somewhere in the digital ocean...
The Bottle

One app. One message that quietly changed everything.

02 🇸🇮 Slovenia — Nik opens Bottled

A Slovenian game developer & archer sends a message about a gym injury...

"Had the worst gym injury — my shoulder's been a mess ever since..."
03 🇮🇳 India — Ananya replies first

Ananya Samadder — Zoology researcher, painter, reader — reads it and responds:

"Oh, I've had something exactly like that happen too!"
04 One month of friendship
🎮🎨

Game developer & blacksmith meets zoology researcher & painter.
Hours of conversation. Something is forming.

05 Slovenia meets India
🇸🇮 ↔ 🇮🇳

Mountains meet warmth. Kremšnita meets paneer. Two very different worlds become one conversation.

06
📅
June 13
2025

The day that mattered.

07
🇮🇳
"I love you."
"I love you too."
🇸🇮
Our Universe

Us, Illustrated

Every great love story deserves its art. Here's ours.

The way someone drew us — dark-haired girl with her head close to a bespectacled, bearded guy. That's you and me. That's exactly us.

You gave me a rose across buildings. And I held it like it was the whole world. ❤️

The Company

The Fellowship

Every great adventure has its companions. Here is the full party roster.

Slovenian • Human • Rare Build
Nik Završnik
Game Dev · Archer · Blacksmith · Woodworker · Fisher
Builds games and forges knives with equal passion. Draws a bow with quiet precision. Catches fish for the peace of it. Collects swords and weapons the way poets collect words. Allergic to kiwis. Completely immune to distance.
Indian • Human • Creative Force
Ananya Samadder
Zoology Researcher · Painter · Reader · Your Person
Studies life in its most intricate forms. Paints the world she sees. Reads to live a thousand lives. The one who replied to a gym injury message and accidentally became someone's favourite person.
🧀
Indian Cuisine
Paneer
Soft Cheese Mage
A Slovenian blacksmith tried paneer and immediately understood why it rules. Bridges cultures with every dish. Nik's beloved Indian food — adopted without hesitation.
🫓
Indian Bread
Naan
Flatbread Paladin
Soft, warm, slightly charred. So good it crossed continents and won the heart of a man who forges his own blades. Reliable. Essential. Iconic.
🥛
Indian Drink
Mango Lassi
Cooling Potions Brewer
The Fellowship's healer. Restores stamina after archery sessions. Available in mango form for elite members. Ananya-certified, Nik-endorsed.
🥟
Indian Street Food
Samosa
Crispy Rogue
Explosive flavour in a deceptively simple casing. A triangle of pure joy. The party member who shows up exactly when needed.
🌯
Indian Street Food
Pakoda & Bhaji
Monsoon Warriors
Nik's adopted Indian snacks. Crispy on the outside, warm on the inside. Best enjoyed during rain, though a Slovenian mountain drizzle also works.
🍮
Slovenian Dessert
Kremšnita
Cream Puff Sorcerer
The pride of Slovenia. Nik's homeland in dessert form. Layers so perfect that Ananya now thinks about it constantly. A cultural ambassador made of vanilla custard.
☕
Italian via Slovenia
Tiramisu
Coffee-Soaked Enchanter
Nik's favourite dessert alongside Kremšnita. Layers of mascarpone and espresso. Sophisticated. Quietly addictive. The international diplomat of the dessert world.
The Distance Between

Two Worlds, One Story

🇸🇮 Slovenia
Land of Mountains & Snow
  • 🏔️The Julian Alps — his favourite place on earth
  • ❄️Winter snow and pine forests
  • 🍮Kremšnita from Bled
  • 🎵Parni Valjak & Thompson
  • 🎮Game worlds built from code and passion
  • 🏹Archery at sunrise
  • 🔨Blacksmithing & knife-forging
  • 🚗Vintage Ferraris & Choppers
  • ⚔️Swords, weapons, and a deep love of craft
  • 🏊Swimming in alpine lakes
  • 🎣Fishing — patience in motion
  • 🪵Woodworking by hand
❤️
385
Days
Together
🇮🇳 India
Land of Warmth & Colour
  • ☀️Warm sun and vibrant, colourful life
  • 🧀Paneer and naan — Nik's favourites now
  • 🥛Mango lassi on summer afternoons
  • 🥟Samosas & pakodas from street corners
  • 🌸Festival colours and celebrations
  • 🧬Zoology research & a love of living things
  • 🎨Paintings made from feeling, not just colour
  • 📚Books read in every spare moment
  • 🌙Midnight calls across time zones
  • 🌶️Spices that tell a thousand stories
  • 🌿A researcher who loves life in all its forms
  • 💌A girl who replied to one message and never stopped

Thousands of kilometres apart. Still choosing each other every single day. Still saying "I love you" more times than can ever be counted.
Still building something real — one call, one message, one day at a time.

A Confession

Things You Accidentally
Made Me Love

Before you, I didn't know what I was missing. You showed me, Nik.

🇸🇮
Slovenia

A country I barely knew existed. Now I know its mountains by name, its desserts by heart, its music by feel. You made an entire nation feel like somewhere I've always wanted to be.

❄️
Snow

I'm from a place where it never snows. But the way you talk about winter in the Alps — the silence of it, the softness of it — I found myself wanting to see it with you.

🏔️
Mountains

You made mountains feel sacred. Not just beautiful — but like a place where everything becomes clear. I want to stand on one with you someday and understand why you love them so much.

🍮
Kremšnita

A dessert from a country I've never visited. And yet I think about it — because you described it the way you describe everything you love. With joy, with detail, with that particular enthusiasm that is entirely, wonderfully you.

🕷️
Spider-Man

I know things about Spider-Man now that I never expected to know. Not because I went looking — but because you love him so completely that it became impossible not to care. That's what love does.

🔨
Blacksmithing & Making Things

A man who forges his own knives, builds his own games, shapes wood with his hands — you made creation feel like the most romantic act in the world. You make things. You build worlds. That is extraordinary.

🏹
Archery

The idea of you drawing a bow — still, focused, utterly present — it fits you so perfectly it hurts. There's a kind of quiet strength in it. The same quiet strength I see in everything you do.

🎵
Slovenian Music

Songs in a language I don't speak, from a culture I'm still learning. And yet the feeling travels perfectly. Parni Valjak. Thompson. Music that sounds like you.

🏠
Home Being a Person

I used to think home was a place. A house, a city, a country. Then I met you. And now home is a timezone-crossing voice call. A message that arrives in the middle of the night. A person 6,000 km away who feels closer than anyone I know.

🧙‍♂️
You

You arrived as a message about a gym injury. You became the most important part of my day, every day, for 385 days. I love you, Nik Završnik. I love you the way you love the mountains — completely, without needing to explain why.

You didn't just show me Slovenia.
You showed me that distance is just a number.
That connection doesn't need proximity.
That the right person makes the whole world feel
smaller, warmer, and more worth exploring.

Known Vulnerabilities

⚠️ Debuff Registry

Every legendary character has weaknesses. This one has exactly two.

🥝
KIWI
⚠ CRITICAL DAMAGE — BIOLOGICAL

Full system rejection initiated. Game Developer unit cannot process kiwi without suffering immediate stat penalties. Do not offer at any difficulty level, in any dish, in any disguise. It will find it.

🥚
BOILED EGGS
⚠ IMMEDIATE REJECTION — SENSORY

The texture. The smell. The entire concept. This character will exit the area, abandon all active quests, and potentially leave the server. Boiled eggs are a lore-breaking event in this universe.

NOTE: Despite known debuffs, overall build remains EXCEPTIONAL. We keep him. Always.

Audio Log

Soundtrack of Us

The songs that carry our story. Slovenian, English, and everything in between.

🎵
Parni Valjak — His Favourite Band
🇸🇮 Croatian Rock / Slovenia

The sound of home. The music that plays in his world — and so it plays in ours. Every song a story.

🎶
Marko Perković Thompson
🇸🇮 His Favourite Singer

A voice that carries deep feeling. Music that doesn't need translation. The kind of song you hear and immediately feel something.

🎸
Takeover — Slovenian Love Song
🇸🇮 Slovenian

Some songs describe exactly what this is — someone who takes over your world without asking. That's what happened here.

🎹
A Thousand Years — Christina Perri
🌍 English

"I have loved you for a thousand years. I'll love you for a thousand more." — This was written about us, obviously.

🎼
Can't Help Falling in Love — Elvis
🌍 English

Wise men say only fools rush in. But we couldn't help it either. It happened over a gym injury and we never looked back.

🎺
Late Night Call Playlist
🌙 Both Worlds

The songs that played in the background while we talked for hours. One of us always talking past midnight. These belong to us and no one else.

Early Days
First Video Calls

Nik in his headphones, talking about everything. Ananya in the corner thumbnail, smiling. This is what "I love you" looks like when the screen is the only bridge you have.

Call
Fan Art
How Someone Drew Us

A dark-haired girl close to a bespectacled, bearded guy. The artist got it exactly right. That's Ananya and Nik. That's exactly them.

Us
Valentine's Day 2026
A Valentine's Call

Ananya on screen. Nik watching in the corner. A Valentine's Day spent 6,000 km apart — and yet completely together. Distance was never the point.

Valentine's
Valentine's Day 2026
That Look

She's looking at him the way she always does. Soft. Happy. Like he's the funniest and the warmest thing she's ever found. He is.

Valentine's
A Call Outside
Leather Jacket Nik

He called from outside in his leather jacket, Ananya's thumbnail in the corner. She saw the sky above him. He showed her his world, bit by bit, call by call.

Call
Outdoors Together
His Jacket, Her Thumbnail

Nik from below, sky behind him, Ananya watching from the corner of the screen. This is what their world looks like. Not side by side — but always watching over each other.

Together
March 30, 2026 — 10:38 PM
Nik + Cat + Call

Nik on a call, headphones on — and a cat deciding that now is the perfect moment to investigate the camera. Some things are unplanned and perfect. This was one of them.

Chaos
Sep 4, 2025 — 5:44 PM
Sunglasses Nik

He sent this on a sunny day. A stadium behind him, sunglasses on, that confident look he does. Ananya saved this immediately. Obviously.

🕶 Icon
July 30, 2025 — 1:32 PM
Two Spoons — "Us"

He held up two spoons and captioned it "Us." A big spoon and a small spoon. Simple, funny, romantic, and exactly the kind of thing that makes someone fall a little harder.

Us ❤️
Childhood — Nik Turns 2
Baby Nik & His Birthday Cake

He showed her this and she melted completely. A tiny Nik with a chocolate birthday cake that has his name on it. The origin story of the person she loves.

Origin
A Quiet Evening
That Warm Smile

On the couch, soft lighting, smiling that way he does when he's relaxed and happy. This is the face she thinks about when she hears his name. This exact one.

Favourite
Heart Hands
A Heart for You

He made a heart with his hands in the mirror and sent it to her. That's it. That's the whole story of who he is — the man who forges knives and sends heart-hand selfies to his girlfriend.

Anniversary
Thank you for answering that message on Bottled.   Thank you for becoming my friend. Thank you for becoming my favourite person.   Thank you for choosing us every day. Across countries. Across time zones. Across distance.   You made Slovenia feel close. You made the future feel exciting. You made me believe that home can be a person.   You forge knives and build game worlds and draw a bow and catch fish and love Spider-Man. You are the most interesting person I have ever met.   Happy First Anniversary, Nik.   I love you. — Ananya 🌸
✦ YEAR 1 COMPLETE ✦
YEAR 2 UNLOCKED ❤️

DEVELOPER NOTES
Version 1.0.0 — Build: Ananya × Nik — Release: June 13, 2026
Features
  • One Slovenian game developer / archer / blacksmith / woodworker (unique, irreplaceable build)
  • One Indian zoology researcher / painter / reader (Ananya — cause of everything)
  • Daily affection system — "I love you" count: ∞
  • Cross-country compatibility layer (distance: 6,000+ km — still stable)
  • Full fantasy support: WoW, RuneScape, TES, LotR, Harry Potter, Spider-Man
  • Kremšnita appreciation module (fully operational)
  • Naan & paneer diplomatic bridge (active)
  • Spider-Man knowledge base (exceeds server capacity)
  • Weapon collection system (swords, knives, bows — all forged or collected with love)
Known Bugs
  • Distance [OPEN — highest priority fix]
  • Missing hugs [CRITICAL]
  • Missing cuddles [CRITICAL]
  • Time zones [CANNOT REPRODUCE on same continent]
  • Kiwi proximity hazard [KNOWN — WILL NOT FIX]
  • Boiled egg exposure [KNOWN — AVOID AT ALL COSTS]
Planned Updates
  • Meeting in person [MOST ANTICIPATED PATCH OF ALL TIME]
  • Kremšnita eaten together [Priority Feature]
  • Standing on a mountain together [Legendary Quest]
  • More anniversaries [Recurring release schedule]
  • Growing old together [Final Build — no end date]
STATUS: Still in active development. No plans to discontinue. Ever.
